full_text:
He Sui 何隨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Sui (何隨)was born in Pi County, Shu Commandery. An honest, talented man who served the Shu dynasty and, later, the Jin dynasty. He Sui was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. He Sui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
